description: AI-powered OCT retinal lesion segmentation and patient management interface for ophthalmologists

package.json.description: NPM dependencies and project scripts. Contains Next.js, React, Radix UI components, TailwindCSS, Shadcn/UI, and utility libraries

pnpm-lock.yaml.description: PNPM package manager lock file for reproducible dependency installations

package-lock.json.description: NPM package manager lock file (also available as pnpm-lock.yaml)

tsconfig.json.description: TypeScript compiler configuration for strict type checking and Next.js compatibility

next.config.mjs.description: Next.js configuration with custom build and runtime settings

postcss.config.mjs.description: PostCSS configuration for TailwindCSS processing and autoprefixing

components.json.description: Shadcn/UI configuration. Sets up component aliases, TailwindCSS options, icon library (lucide), and component style (new-york)

.gitignore.description: Git ignore rules for excluding node_modules, .next build output, and other development files

app/.description: Next.js App Router directory - main application entry point and layout

layout.tsx.description: Root layout component that wraps entire application. Sets metadata (title: 'RetinaAI - OCT Retinal Analysis'), viewport configuration, font imports, analytics integration, and global styles

page.tsx.description: Home/main page component - entry point for the application

globals.css.description: Global CSS styles applied to entire application, including TailwindCSS directives and custom CSS variables

components/.description: React components organized by feature and category

ui/.description: Reusable UI component primitives built with Shadcn/UI and Radix UI

files.accordion.tsx: Collapsible accordion component for expandable content sections
files.alert-dialog.tsx: Modal dialog for alert messages requiring user confirmation
files.badge.tsx: Small label/tag component for categorization and status indicators
files.breadcrumb.tsx: Navigation breadcrumb component showing page hierarchy
files.button-group.tsx: Grouped button component for related actions
files.button.tsx: Base button component with multiple variants and sizes
files.card.tsx: Container component for content grouping with optional shadow/border
files.chart.tsx: Data visualization chart component (likely using charting library)
files.dialog.tsx: Modal dialog component for forms and important content
files.dropdown-menu.tsx: Dropdown menu component for actions and navigation
files.empty.tsx: Empty state component displayed when no data is available
files.form.tsx: Form component with validation support (react-hook-form integration)
files.hover-card.tsx: Card component that appears on hover for additional information
files.menubar.tsx: Horizontal menubar component for primary navigation
files.pagination.tsx: Pagination control component for data tables/lists
files.progress.tsx: Progress bar component showing completion percentage
files.radio-group.tsx: Radio button group component for single selection
files.resizable.tsx: Resizable panel component with draggable dividers
files.scroll-area.tsx: Scrollable area with custom scrollbar styling
files.select.tsx: Dropdown select component for option selection
files.skeleton.tsx: Placeholder skeleton component for loading states
files.slider.tsx: Range slider component for numeric input
files.table.tsx: Data table component with sorting and filtering capabilities
files.toggle-group.tsx: Grouped toggle component for multiple selections
files.tooltip.tsx: Tooltip component showing hint on hover

patients/.description: Patient management and profile components specific to ophthalmology practice

files.patient-list.tsx: Component displaying list of patients with search, filter, and pagination
files.patient-profile.tsx: Individual patient profile page showing medical history and OCT results
files.patients-dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard view for patient management with overview metrics
files.compare-modal.tsx: Modal component for comparing multiple patient OCT scans side-by-side

scanner/.description: OCT scanner interface and image analysis components

files.scanner-dashboard.tsx: Main OCT scanner interface for uploading and analyzing retinal images
files.image-uploader.tsx: Component for uploading OCT scan images with drag-and-drop
files.inference-metrics.tsx: Display component showing AI model inference results (accuracy, segmentation scores)
files.analysis-viewer.tsx: Component for viewing and analyzing segmentation results with overlay visualization
files.validation-panel.tsx: Panel for validating AI-generated segmentation masks before saving
files.patient-assignment.tsx: Component for assigning analyzed scans to specific patients
files.patient-context-panel.tsx: Side panel showing patient context during scan analysis
files.processing-overlay.tsx: Loading/processing overlay shown during AI inference
files.export-pdf.tsx: Component for exporting analysis results as PDF report

root_components.app-sidebar.tsx: Main application sidebar with navigation menu
root_components.doctor-header.tsx: Header component showing doctor information and quick actions
root_components.new-patient-modal.tsx: Modal form for registering new patients
root_components.theme-provider.tsx: Theme context provider for dark/light mode switching

api.ts.description: API client functions for communication with backend. Handles requests to endpoints like image upload, inference, patient CRUD operations

store.tsx.description: Global state management (likely using React Context or Zustand) for app-wide state like current patient, selected scans, UI state

utils.ts.description: Helper functions for formatting, validation, type checking, and common operations

hooks/.description: Custom React hooks for reusable logic

use-mobile.ts.description: Hook for detecting mobile/responsive viewport and triggering responsive layout changes

use-toast.ts.description: Hook for displaying toast notifications with predefined types (success, error, info, warning)

globals.css.description: Global CSS with TailwindCSS configuration, CSS custom properties for theming, and base element styles

public/.description: Static assets served directly by Next.js

files.placeholder.svg: Generic placeholder SVG for UI mockups

.next/.description: Next.js build output directory (auto-generated, not tracked in version control)
.next/.note: Contains production-ready optimized code and static assets

node_modules/.description: NPM/PNPM installed dependencies directory (excluded from version control)

dataFlow.user_interaction: User interacts with UI components in browser
dataFlow.api_calls: API client (lib/api.ts) sends requests to backend
dataFlow.backend_communication: Backend processes requests (image analysis, patient data CRUD)
dataFlow.ui_update: Components re-render based on state changes

key_features: Patient Management - Register, view, compare patient profiles
OCT Image Analysis - Upload retinal scans and run segmentation AI
Inference Results - Display segmentation masks and validation metrics
PDF Export - Generate and download analysis reports
Responsive Design - Works on desktop and mobile devices
Dark/Light Theme - Theme switching with theme-provider

architecture_notes.component_structure: Feature-based organization (patients/, scanner/) with shared UI primitives
architecture_notes.styling_approach: Tailwind CSS with CSS custom properties for theming
architecture_notes.form_handling: React Hook Form with validation using @hookform/resolvers
architecture_notes.ui_framework: Shadcn/UI provide styled components built on Radix UI primitives
architecture_notes.state_pattern: Centralized state management likely through React Context or Zustand
